title: Iranian financial ecosystem
description: Analysis of sanctions evasion infrastructure across Iranian state and commercial actors. Investigative focus on oil-linked procurement payment flows, VASP wallet rotation patterns used to obfuscate transaction trails, and cross-border payment rails — including stablecoin infrastructure — designed to circumvent OFAC restrictions. Exposure threads across Venezuelan and Myanmar procurement networks.

title: Russian sanctions-adjacent financial network
description: Investigation of high-risk Russian-linked financial infrastructure operating in sanctions-adjacent territory. Analysis of Garantex-adjacent exchanger activity, nested liquidity providers, and illicit payment providers (Heleket, Cryptomus) facilitating RUB-denominated flows and cross-border value movement outside sanctioned channels.

title: DPRK-linked financial infrastructure
description: Counter-threat finance analysis of DPRK revenue generation and laundering infrastructure. Scope includes IT worker ecosystem activity — front companies, wallet rotation, cross-chain layering — and the adversarial financial infrastructure used to move value in support of state objectives. Produced under national-security-adjacent scrutiny requirements.

title: Southeast Asian illicit payment ecosystem
description: Investigation and intelligence dissemination on Huione and Xinbi-linked infrastructure and the guarantee system ecosystem embedded in Southeast Asian cybercrime and money laundering networks. Delivered as a large-scale internal intelligence briefing — covering payment rail architecture, actor typology, and exposure pathways for financial institutions operating in the region.

title: Cybercrime infrastructure — threat actor financial analysis
description: Technical investigation of cybercrime-linked financial activity and underlying infrastructure. Includes Scattered Spider-related exposure analysis, UAB product and hosting infrastructure reviews, exploit-linked fund tracing, and entity attribution across fraud-linked payment ecosystems. Focus on the financial infrastructure layer supporting cybercrime operations.

title: Dual-use technology & procurement exposure
description: Strategic intelligence analysis of procurement exposure in sanctions-sensitive contexts. Focus on drone procurement ecosystem exposure, dual-use technology supply-chain risk, and the payment pathways associated with adversarial logistics networks tied to sanctioned jurisdictions.
